contributions.name: getsolus / packages
contributions.description: Package repository for the Solus Linux distribution
content: Packaged and maintain the Stripe CLI application, an app used for stripe development
Packaged and maintain Vala Language Server, a language server for Vala
Packaged and maintain Vala Lint, a linter for Vala
Packaged and maintain IVPN, a popular privacy-focused VPN client

contributions.name: vala-lang / vala-docs
contributions.description: Documentation website for the Vala programming language
content: Ported static site generator from Sphinx to VitePress
Ported hundreds of documentation from reStructuredText to Markdown
Added documentation for numeric literal suffixes
Added documentation on data type sizes and ranges
Ported archived gnome Vala syntax guide from wiki
Various miscellaneous fixes and improvements

contributions.name: elementary / monitor
contributions.description: Vala and GTK-based system monitor application made for the Linux distro elementary OS
content: Updated statusbar and indicator gpu usage to use most-active GPU on multi-GPU systems
Added swap usage and total info to memory graph
Updated metainfo file naming convention
Tested per-process GPU usage and added support for amd-systems through libgtop and fdinfo
Patched issue with csv parsing of cpu information
Created CI/CD test runner action

contributions.name: elementary / settings-power
contributions.description: Vala and GTK-based system power settings application made for the Linux distro elementary OS
content: Patched switch sizing issue being enlarged by dependency update

contributions.name: elementary / appcenter-dashboard
contributions.description: Elixer-based web app for managing appcenter apps made for the Linux distro elementary OS
content: Patched issue where content was cut-off on mobile layouts

contributions.name: elementary / screenshot
contributions.description: Vala and GTK-based screenshot application made for the Linux distro elementary OS
content: Patched segfault issue where app crashed when screenshot height is 1/4x or more greater than the width

contributions.name: greenmail-mail-test / greenmail
contributions.description: Java-based email testing library to send, receive, and verify emails
content: Patched issue where duplicate mime messages were showing up when cc and bcc share the same address as the destination
